title: tragacantha subalpina
intro: Tragacantha subalpina, also known as the alpine starthistle or lesser knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha subalpina include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's flowers, leaves, and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
